title: ranunculus spicatus var. rupestris
intro: Ranunculus spicatus var. rupestris, commonly known as the 'Rock Ranunculus' or ' Alpine Buttercup', is a perennial plant species in the Ranunculaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits associated with Ranunculus spicatus var. rupestris include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
